'''darate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:oligarchically|oligarchically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oligarchically|oligarchically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| darate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:darate|darate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:daratesher|daratesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:daratesherĂ«m|daratesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:daratero|daratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:darateshĂ«|darateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:darateshĂ«m|darateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidaratero|gokidaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidarateshĂ«|gokidarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidarateshĂ«m|gokidarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godarankerom|godarankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godarankeshĂ«|godarankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godarankeshĂ«m|godarankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godarankeya|godarankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:daraterom|daraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:daratemu|daratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:darateya|darateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidaraterom|gokidaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidaratemu|gokidaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidarateya|gokidarateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dararate|dararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dararatesher|dararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dararatesherĂ«m|dararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dararatero|dararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dararateshĂ«|dararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dararateshĂ«m|dararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidararatero|gokidararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidararateshĂ«|gokidararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidararateshĂ«m|gokidararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godararankerom|godararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godararankeshĂ«|godararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godararankeshĂ«m|godararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godararankeya|godararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dararaterom|dararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dararatemu|dararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dararateya|dararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidararaterom|gokidararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidararatemu|gokidararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidararateya|gokidararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠrĂŠte|dĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠrĂŠtesher|dĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠrĂŠtero|dĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠrĂŠtero|gokidĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠrĂŠnkerom|godĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠrĂŠnkeya|godĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠrĂŠterom|dĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠrĂŠtemu|dĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠrĂŠteya|dĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠrĂŠterom|gokidĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠrĂŠteya|gokidĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafrafte|dafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafraftesher|dafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafraftesherĂ«m|dafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafraftero|dafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafrafteshĂ«|dafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafrafteshĂ«m|dafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafraftero|gokidafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafrafteshĂ«|gokidafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafrafteshĂ«m|gokidafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafrafnkerom|godafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafrafnkeshĂ«|godafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafrafnkeshĂ«m|godafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafrafnkeya|godafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafrafterom|dafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafraftemu|dafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafrafteya|dafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafrafterom|gokidafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafraftemu|gokidafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafrafteya|gokidafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
